subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented before Our countenance and illumined by the light of Our presence, and that which was mentioned therein hath been observed. Praise be to the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و بنور حضور منور و آنچه در او مذکور ملاحظه شد حمد محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
